case_title: WAN MING YU VS. ALUY-WU CHOY et al

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF YU, WAN MING RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CHOY, ALUY-WU $10,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $140.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $10,140.00, AT PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST, PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM AGAINST KUO SEN LUY-ALUY IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. (NO PROOF OF SERVICE.) STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT CHOY, ALUY-WU HEARING SET FOR AUG-13-2014 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY PLAINTIFF YU, WAN MING
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEES $65.00 SERVED MAR-05-2014, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT CHOY, ALUY-WU

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-18-2014 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-18-2014 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. NO PROOF OF SERVICE FOR DEFENDANT LUY-ALUY KUO SENG. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY YU, WAN MING AS TO DEFENDANT CHOY, ALUY-WU SENG, LUY-ALUY KUO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-18-2014 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-18-2014 - JUDGMENT.
ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE THE SMALL CLAIMS MOTION TO VACATE HEARING. THE REQUEST IS GRANTED.
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY ALUY-WU CHOY, LUY-ALUY KUO SENG SET FOR SEP-15-2014 IS CONTINUED TO OCT-06-2014 AT 3:30 PM IN 506.

MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY ALUY-WU CHOY, LUY-ALUY KUO SENG IS GRANTED. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF WAS ASSISTED BY CANTONESE INTERPRETER---KENG CHUN KWAN. NO COSTS AWARDED BY COURT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY ALUY-WU CHOY, LUY-ALUY KUO SENG SET FOR AUG-13-2014 IS CONTINUED TO SEP-15-2014 AT 1:30 PM IN 506.
CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO LUY-ALUY KUO SENG BY COURT AT SMALL CLAIM HEARING OF APR-18-2014 AT 3:30 PM.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF YU, WAN MING IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT CHOY, ALUY-WU MOTION TO VACATE IS GRANTED. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING (MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT); BY FAX FILED BY DEFENDANT CHOY, ALUY-WU
ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE THE SMALL CLAIMS MOTION TO VACATE HEARING. THE REQUEST IS GRANTED.
